name: Booking prep
description: When a confirmed booking is less than a day away, a prep task appears on your list — due when the meeting starts.
prompt: Watch my calendar for confirmed bookings starting within the next 24 hours. For each one, add a task titled "Prepare: <event summary>" due at the event's start time, so I never walk into a booking cold.

vault.why: Watches confirmed bookings on your calendar and files a prep task for each one.
